ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the country (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX) */,
  "country_flag" TEXT /* File path to the country's flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the administrator is managing */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the administrator account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photographers" (
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photographer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the photographer belongs to */,
  "photographer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the photographer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the photographer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the photographer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the photographer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the photographer account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photographer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photographers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photographer who submitted the photo */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the photo belongs to */,
  "photo_name" TEXT /* Name of the photo */,
  "photo_file" TEXT /* File path to the photo */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the photo was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_photographer_id FOREIGN KEY ("photographer_id") REFERENCES photographers ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photo that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the award (e.g., 1st place, 2nd place, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the judge */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the judge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the judge account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photo being reviewed */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who gave the review */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Score given by the judge (out of 10) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments given by the judge */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants from the country */,
  "total_photos" INTEGER /* Total number of photos submitted by the country */,
  "total_awards" INTEGER /* Total number of awards won by the country */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photo_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photo the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photo_tags_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id")
)
